summary: 罗青 (Luo Qing), a young cowherd, accidentally witnesses a battle between Demon Sect leaders and Daoists. He is captured by the Demon Sect's Hall Master Gu. Sect Master Fang, his son Fang Zun, and Hall Master Gu return to their North Branch headquarters at Panlong Mountain, only to discover their entire sect has been massacred by Daoist enemies. Hall Master Gu finds her lover Qin Ling dead. In absolute grief and rage, Sect Master Fang places the sleeping Fang Zun into his magical artifact, the Da Ming Dan, and uses it to destroy Panlong Mountain, burying the dead. He vows revenge against the Daoists.

active_characters.罗青: Captured by the Demon Sect, currently held inside a magical bag.
active_characters.方宗主: Leader of the Demon Sect North Branch, grieving the destruction of his sect.
active_characters.方尊: Fang's young son, currently sleeping inside the Da Ming Dan.
active_characters.古堂主: Grieving the death of Qin Ling, left with his body.

recent_events: Luo Qing is captured by Hall Master Gu in a glowing bag.
The Demon Sect leaders arrive at Panlong Mountain after returning from the South Branch.
They discover the entire North Branch massacred, including the elders and Qin Ling.
Sect Master Fang destroys Panlong Mountain using the Da Ming Dan and vows revenge.
